tools.name: accounts.mybusinessbusinessinformationAccountsLocationsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Location that will be owned by the logged in user.

tools.name: accounts.mybusinessbusinessinformationAccountsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists the locations for the specified account.

tools.name: attributes.mybusinessbusinessinformationAttributesList
tools.description: Returns the list of attributes that would be available for a location with the given primary category and country.

tools.name: categories.mybusinessbusinessinformationCategoriesBatchGet
tools.description: Returns a list of business categories for the provided language and GConcept ids.

tools.name: categories.mybusinessbusinessinformationCategoriesList
tools.description: Returns a list of business categories. Search will match the category name but not the category ID. Search only matches the front of a category name (that is, 'food' may return 'Food Court' but not 'Fast Food Restaurant').

tools.name: chains.mybusinessbusinessinformationChainsSearch
tools.description: Searches the chain based on chain name.

tools.name: googleLocations.mybusinessbusinessinformationGoogleLocationsSearch
tools.description: Search all of the possible locations that are a match to the specified request.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsAssociate
tools.description: Associates a location to a place ID. Any previous association is overwritten. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified. The association must be valid, that is, it appears in the list of `SearchGoogleLocations`.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsAttributesGetGoogleUpdated
tools.description: Gets the Google-updated version of the specified location.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsClearLocationAssociation
tools.description: Clears an association between a location and its place ID. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a location. If this location cannot be deleted using the API and it is marked so in the `google.mybusiness.businessinformation.v1.LocationState`, use the [Google Business Profile](https://business.google.com/manage/) website.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsGetAttributes
tools.description: Looks up all the attributes set for a given location.

tools.name: locations.mybusinessbusinessinformationLocationsUpdateAttributes
tools.description: Update attributes for a given location.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
